title: Enrollment submissions silently rejected - missing emailAddress field
description: The Google Form has collect-email enabled, making emailAddress a required built-in field. The branded form omitted it, so every submission was rejected with HTTP 400; the no-cors fetch hid the rejection and showed a false success screen. Fix: added a required email field and switched to a native form POST into a hidden iframe. Verified server-side and end-to-end.

title: Meta WhatsApp Embedded Signup: app-review asset/policy readiness
description:
Requirements for Meta App Review (WhatsApp Embedded Signup):
[DONE] Privacy Policy URL mentioning WhatsApp data handling -> https://www.vozclinic.com/privacy/ (new section 5 WhatsApp Business Platform (Meta); ES /aviso-de-privacidad/ section 5). Covers business-account data, message content/metadata, contact data, Embedded Signup access tokens, no-ads/no-sale, links to Meta + WhatsApp Business policies.
[DONE] Data Deletion instructions URL -> https://www.vozclinic.com/privacy/#data-deletion (ES /aviso-de-privacidad/#data-deletion). 30-day deletion on request, 90-day token/conversation purge on disconnect.
[DONE] Terms of Service URL -> https://www.vozclinic.com/terms/ (pre-existing).
[DONE] App icon 1024x1024 PNG no transparency -> public/voz-clinic-icon.png (verified 1024x1024, hasAlpha:no), URL https://www.vozclinic.com/voz-clinic-icon.png.
[OPEN] Valid OAuth redirect URI (HTTPS, on our domain) e.g. https://app.vozclinic.com/auth/whatsapp/callback -> INFRA: app.vozclinic.com subdomain must exist, serve HTTPS, and handle the callback. Not part of the landing repo.

title: SEO: real favicon.ico + PNG icon set (fix GSC Vercel-triangle favicon)
description: Google showed Vercel's triangle in search because the site declared only an SVG favicon and /favicon.ico 404'd (apex 307->www, www returns 404). Google requests /favicon.ico first and fell back to a stale cached Vercel icon. Fix: built public/favicon.ico (16/32/48 multi-layer) from public/assets/vozclinic-favicon.png (500x500, user-provided), added favicon-96x96.png + apple-touch-icon.png (180), declared all in index.html (carries to /en/ via prerender). Remaining manual step: after deploy, GSC URL Inspection -> homepage -> Request Indexing; favicon refresh can take days-weeks.
close_reason: Icon set built and wired; build+prerender verified. Pending deploy + GSC re-index request.

title: SEO/Local: create & claim Google Business Profile
description: Highest-leverage local channel for Tijuana-to-Tijuana sale. Create/claim GBP for VozClinic (software/SaaS, Tijuana), NAP matching LocalBusiness schema (+52 663 315 4686), set service areas Tijuana/Playas/Rosarito, gather a few real reviews. Founder task (not code); blocks aggregateRating + sameAs schema work.

title: SEO/Local: geo targeting Tijuana, Playas de Tijuana, Rosarito
description: Buyer clinics are in Tijuana, Playas de Tijuana, and Rosarito; rank in those local areas. Add 'Playas de Tijuana' to LocalBusiness.areaServed (currently Tijuana/Rosarito/Mexicali/Ensenada/Baja California), align GBP service areas to these cities, and ensure geo meta + local relevance in copy. Non-code part: set service area in GBP.
notes: Cross-border US targets added 2026-06-24: San Ysidro + San Diego (US side). Likely searchers there are English-speaking US-resident clinic owners/operators running clinics in TJ — buyer audience, not patients. US-side ranking depends on the English /en/ route (vozclinic-landing-9pp) + English content/keywords; GBP service area is MX-bound so US reach comes via organic EN pages, not GBP.

title: SEO: sync FAQPage JSON-LD with content.ts (4 of 8)
description: index.html FAQ JSON-LD lists only 4 of the 8 FAQ items in src/data/content.ts. Add the 4 missing (English-speak, cancel, integrations, design-partner) or generate the JSON-LD from content.ts so it cannot drift. Keep in sync per project memory.
notes: When syncing FAQ JSON-LD, also emit an English FAQPage for /en/ (the EN page currently inherits Spanish JSON-LD via prerender). Best approach: generate the ld+json graph per-locale in prerender.mjs from content.ts rather than hardcoding in index.html.
close_reason: FAQPage JSON-LD now generated per-locale from content.ts via faqJsonLd() in entry-server.tsx, injected by prerender.mjs. Removed hardcoded 4-item FAQPage from index.html. ES + EN pages each emit all 8 items; can no longer drift. EN now gets English FAQPage.

title: SEO: single H1 on homepage (demote Sofia widget)
description: Live-Sofia widget and hero both render <h1> (2 H1s on page, confirmed live). Demote the Sofia widget heading to <h2>; hero stays the only H1. One H1 per page.
close_reason: Demoted Sofía live-widget heading from h1 to h2 in SofiaAgent.tsx; hero is now the only H1. Verified single H1 in both prerendered locales.

title: SEO: English /en/ prerendered route + hreflang
description: Make English indexable so the site can also rank in English. Prerender a second route at /en/ with English content (render entry-server with a locale arg), add reciprocal hreflang (es/en/x-default) in both pages and the sitemap, set <html lang> per route. Touches prerender.mjs, entry-server.tsx, App.tsx/LangContext, index.html, sitemap.xml. User confirmed 2026-06-24 they DO want English ranking.
notes: DONE 2026-06-25: /en/ prerendered route live. LangContext is route-driven (initialLang prop, removed localStorage auto-upgrade anti-pattern), App/entry-server/main.tsx thread initialLang (client derives from pathname so hydration matches), TopBar toggle now navigates / <-> /en/ as real links. prerender.mjs renders both locales with asserted EN <head> swaps (lang, title, description, canonical, og:url/title/desc, og:locale, twitter). hreflang es/en/x-default added to source index.html (both pages). sitemap.xml has both URLs with reciprocal alternates. Build verified: dist/en/index.html renders English body + correct head, dist/index.html unchanged ES. Lint: no new errors (removed 1). REMAINING follow-up: JSON-LD on /en/ is still Spanish (FAQ + descriptions) — folded into b65 + 5up.
close_reason: English /en/ prerendered route + hreflang + localized head + sitemap shipped and build-verified. EN JSON-LD localization tracked under b65/5up.

title: P2.1 SSR/prerender — fix client-side-only SPA before any organic traffic push
description:
From vozclinic-site-changes.md review 2026-05-27. Critical SEO blocker: curl https://vozclinic.com returns only
. Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, all AI search engines see zero body content. Same SPA-without-SSR pattern that hurt LNL Group sites post-migration. Two paths: 1. Vite SSG via vite-react-ssg (or vite-plugin-prerender). Smaller change. Snapshots the home page + qualifier pages at build time to static HTML. SPA still hydrates at runtime. 2. Migrate to Next.js. Bigger change but cleaner long-term, also unlocks per-route metadata and easy ISR. Recommendation: option 1 for this iteration since the site is a single-route SPA today. Reconsider Next.js if/when the landing grows into a multi-route product site. Acceptance: curl https://vozclinic.com must return full body HTML (hero h1, pain points, features, pricing, FAQ, founder note). Lighthouse SEO score 90+. Existing forms + signing proxies untouched.
close_reason: Shipped in dee89e3 via Vite SSR + post-build prerender script. dist/index.html now contains ~53KB of prerendered body content (hero, pain, features, pricing, FAQ, founder note). Verified locally via vite preview + curl.

title: Same-day omnibus: P2+P3 from site-changes review (voice angle, stat soft, em dash audit, social proof, schema, Futura badge, static WA button)
description:
Per Lainie's 'fix everything today' instruction after vozclinic-site-changes.md review (2026-05-27). All non-architectural items shipping in this session; SSR (P2.1) deferred to a separate session same day.

Includes:
- Hero h1/sub: add voice/calls + widen audience callout (dental, estética, plástica, dermatología, bariátrica)
- PainPoints: soften 60% cross-border stat
- Features: new phone-call tile (col-span-6)
- content.ts: em dash audit (29 occurrences → commas/periods/colons)
- FounderNote: add credentials chip row (PMP, Six Sigma BB, CSM, 20+yr enterprise PM)
- Announcement bar: 'Presentando en Futura Médica 2026 · 27 de mayo'
- index.html: Service schema for each pricing tier; Person credentials; widened meta description
- Static qualifier pages (10): inject floating WhatsApp button
- Close vozclinic-landing-3tf if FinalCTA '15-minute' is already gone
close_reason: Shipped in f7f51d9: logo swap (vozclinic-logo.png), Futura Médica announcement bar, hero voice+audience widening, pain stat softened, new phone-call feature tile, em dash audit (29→0 in body copy), founder credentials chips, Person/Service schema additions, widened meta description, floating WhatsApp on 10 static pages.

title: P1 tonight: ES default, date copy, remove counter, floating WhatsApp
description:
Pre-Futura-Médica fixes from vozclinic-site-changes.md review (2026-05-27).

Changes:
1. LangContext: force ES as default (was browser-locale based). Saved user toggle still persists.
2. content.ts urgencyBody: reframe Aug→Sep timing around 'Founding partner program closes June 15' since Aug GA target slipped and DPs need to start ASAP (June 15 / July 1).
3. content.ts FAQ '¿Por qué solo 3 socias?': drop the 'August cohort' line.
4. content.ts + DesignPartner.tsx: remove the '3 of 3 spots' counter (signals lack of demand).
5. New FloatingWhatsApp component on SPA: sticky bottom-right, wa.me prefilled with 'Hola Lainie, vi VozClinic en Futura Médica.'

Scope: SPA only. Static qualifier pages in public/ keep their own structure for now — file separate follow-up if floating button should appear there too.
close_reason: Shipped P1 fixes in b590e56 — ES default, DP urgency reframe (June 15 / July 1), counter removed, floating WhatsApp added with Futura Médica prefill.

title: Two intake forms: separate DP intake from generic waitlist
description:
User feedback 2026-05-25: the existing /lista-espera/ and /waitlist/ qualifier form doesn't feel like a design-partner application. The gold-themed DesignPartner section CTA sends visitors into a neutral form that doesn't carry the program's emotional weight forward.

Build:
1. Two new pages: /socio-fundador/ (ES) and /founding-partner/ (EN). Same form fields as the existing qualifier form, but framed aspirationally for the DP program: gold launch-offer badge, sharper headline (e.g., 'Aplica para una de las 3 plazas de socio fundador'), restate DP terms above the form (90 days free + 50% lifetime, only 3 spots), urgency cues. Same backend (POST to /api/sign-qualifier).
2. JS for the DP pages sends an extra field in the payload: source: 'design_partner_intent'. Pairs with lnl-crm issue that reads this and tags the contact.
3. Rewire homepage CTAs: DesignPartner section + Demo section (currently say 'Solicitar uno de los 3 lugares') -> point at the new DP pages. TopBar + Hero + FinalCTA + Pricing keep pointing at /lista-espera/ and /waitlist/ (generic waitlist framing).
4. Both forms still apply identical Phase 1 fit logic (PMS + WhatsApp volume requirements). DP applicants who fail Phase 1 fit still get waitlisted but carry the dp-applicant tag for follow-up.

Net result: Lainie can filter CRM contacts by tag 'dp-applicant' to see exactly who applied for the design partner program, regardless of qualification status.
close_reason: Shipped in commit a03d182: single qualifier form, gold DP CTAs, ?intent=dp param, dual FinalCTA. Vercel auto-deployed.

title: End-to-end form verification on prod
description: After deploy 55ed165 (Edge-runtime fix), manually submit the qualifier form on https://vozclinic.com/lista-espera/ with two distinct payloads: (1) Phase 1 fit combo (Doctocliq + 200-500/week) to verify redirect to /agendar-demo and contact lands in CRM with lead-subtype = 'VozClinic Design Partner'; (2) waitlist combo (Unknown PMS or <50/week) to verify redirect to /lista-gracias and contact lands with lead-subtype = 'VozClinic Waitlist'. Also test referral form at /recomienda/. Close once verified.
close_reason: End-to-end DP intent flow verified by Lainie 2026-05-27: gold CTA → /lista-espera/?intent=dp → form submit → CRM returned Phase 1 fit redirect to Appointy demo booking. CRM-side tag verification pending (contact: lainiem@lnlaiagency.com). Non-Phase-1-fit branch (DP-aware thank-you page) not yet exercised but the inline script is trivial.

title: Branded /design-partner-enroll/ enrollment page
description: Bilingual (ES/EN) enrollment page at /design-partner-enroll/, built as a Vite multi-page entry. Branded form submits into the existing VozClinic design-partner Google Form so responses land in the same sheet as before.

title: Design-partner enrollment page and landing-page updates
description: Branded design-partner enrollment page for vozclinic.com plus landing-page updates. Shipped to production on master (commit dc8c2e3).

title: SEO: apex->www redirect conflicts with non-www canonical
description: vozclinic.com 307-redirects to www.vozclinic.com (observed on /favicon.ico and /favicon.svg), but index.html canonical + og:url point to non-www https://vozclinic.com/. Host/canonical mismatch: Google may index www while canonical claims apex. Decide one canonical host and align: either (a) redirect www->apex to match the existing canonical, or (b) keep apex->www and switch all canonical/og:url/hreflang/sitemap to www. Check Vercel domain config (which is primary) and prerender EN_HEAD canonical swap.
close_reason: Standardized on www.vozclinic.com as canonical host (apex->www redirect already in place). Updated index.html (canonical/hreflang/og/twitter/JSON-LD url), prerender.mjs EN_HEAD swaps, build-blog.mjs SITE const, public/sitemap.xml, public/robots.txt, and legal-page body hrefs (privacy/terms/aviso). Rebuild verified: all canonical/og/hreflang/sitemap/blog URLs emit www; zero non-www left in dist.

title: Copy: expand Features/hero to voice + outbound capabilities
description: Meta now promises voice agent + insurance verification, outreach, promotions, and patient reactivation (annual exams/follow-ups), but Features/hero in content.ts only cover inbound WhatsApp reception. Add the voice channel + outbound capabilities so the page body matches meta/SERP claims (relevance, bounce). Keep informal tú, Sofía with accent, no usted.
notes: Follow-up 2026-06-27: hero ALSO reworked (superseding the earlier 'hero left as-is'). h1 now 'El agente de voz y WhatsApp que contesta, agenda y reactiva pacientes, 24/7.' / EN equivalent — repositions from 'recepcionista' to voice agent and signals inbound+outbound. Subhead keeps the bilingual/English cross-border angle + adds reactivation for annual exams/follow-ups. Build verified ES + EN.
close_reason: Added 3 outbound capability tiles to Features (insurance verification, patient reactivation for annual exams/follow-ups, promotions/outreach campaigns) in content.ts, with 3 new icons + extended bento layout arrays in Features.tsx. JSON-LD featureList synced in index.html (added insurance, reactivation, promotions, phone-calls). Build + prerender verified in ES (/) and EN (/en/). Hero left as-is.

title: SEO: schema gaps (sameAs, Organization, WebSite, Service address)

notes: EN page (/en/) currently carries Spanish JSON-LD descriptions (SoftwareApplication/Service/LocalBusiness). When reworking schema, localize the graph per route (es vs en) — ideally generate it in prerender.mjs per locale.

notes: Footer 'Blog' link wired to /blog/ (lang-aware -> /en/blog/ for EN) now that the blog exists. Still open: 'Sobre nosotros', 'Contacto', and 'Términos'->/terms/ remain href='#'.

description: Homepage meta description is ~290 chars and truncates in SERPs. Tighten to one Spanish sentence: primary keyword (recepcionista de WhatsApp con IA) + Tijuana/Baja local hook. index.html line 10.
close_reason: ES meta title+description rewritten to reflect the real offering (voice+WhatsApp agent: booking/reminders/insurance verification/reactivation/promotions). EN meta copy drafted, ships with the /en/ route (vozclinic-landing-9pp).

title: SEO: Spanish buyer-intent content pages
description: Site is a single homepage; no landing for buyer-intent Spanish queries. Build 2-4 unique Spanish pages (e.g. 'cómo dejar de perder pacientes por WhatsApp', 'WhatsApp Business API para clínicas', ROI/pricing deep-dive, how-it-works). Unique content only, no templated swaps.
notes: Markdown blog engine shipped (scripts/build-blog.mjs) + first bilingual post live: ES /blog/agente-de-voz-bilingue-turismo-medico-tijuana/ and EN /en/blog/bilingual-voice-agent-tijuana-medical-tourism/ (medical-tourism, buyer-intent). More Spanish buyer-intent posts still wanted to fully close.

title: Replace unsourced cross-border claim with Baja Health Cluster stat; refresh hero, pain, trust copy (ES+EN)

Rewrite hero H1/sub/CTAs, pain section heading + 3 blocks, and add a trust band (below demo, above pricing) in both ES and EN.
close_reason: Replaced unsourced cross-border claim with sourced Baja Health Cluster >70% stat; refreshed hero, pain (3 blocks), and added trust band. ES+EN verified in browser, build green.

title: FinalCTA subtitle still references '15-minute call' but button goes to qualifier form
description: src/data/content.ts line ~317-318: finalCta.sub says 'La llamada dura 15 minutos. Si no es para usted, lo sabremos los dos rápido.' / 'The call is 15 minutes. If it's not for you, we'll both know quickly.' The CTA below it was rewired on 2026-05-25 to 'Solicitar mi lugar / Apply for my spot' and now goes to /lista-espera/ (qualifier form), not Calendly. The subtitle now contradicts the destination. Rewrite to align with the form-screening flow (e.g., 'Cuéntame de tu clínica en 2 minutos. Si calificas como Phase 1 fit, agendamos la demo de una vez.').
close_reason: Audited: no '15-minute' references remain in src/, public/, or index.html. Likely fixed in earlier session.
